events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Share agents to Teams
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Share agents to Teams
events.summary: With this feature, users will be able to share their agent with a Microsoft Teams team. Users can search for and find teams in the agent sharing dialog box. Users can also send a notification to the main channel of that team to make members aware of an agent being shared with them, and as an easy way to install and st...
events.summaryJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: With this feature, users will be able to share their agent with a Microsoft Teams team. Users can search for and find teams in the agent sharing dialog box. Users can also send a notification to the main channel of that team to make members aware of an agent being shared with them, and as an easy way to install and st...
events.importanceReason: 提供開始済みで利用可否の確認に直結するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Explain slide selection during PowerPoint Live
events.titleJa: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): PowerPoint Live 中のスライド選択について説明する
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Explain slide selection during PowerPoint Live
events.summary: This feature enhances the PowerPoint Live meeting experience by using Copilot to let attendees select slide text and get explanations for the content.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の更新 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: This feature enhances the PowerPoint Live meeting experience by using Copilot to let attendees select slide text and get explanations for the content.
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / ライセンス設計や展開判断に直結するため

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Knowledge Agent
events.titleJa: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): ナレッジ エージェント
events.summary: Simplifies SharePoint content management and ensures content is Copilot-ready by automating metadata, fixing stale content, enabling fast page creation, improving compliance, and enriching content so Copilot can deliver more accurate, grounded answers.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の更新 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: Simplifies SharePoint content management and ensures content is Copilot-ready by automating metadata, fixing stale content, enabling fast page creation, improving compliance, and enriching content so Copilot can deliver more accurate, grounded answers.
events.importanceReason: 提供開始済みで利用可否の確認に直結するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
events.titleJa: PowerPoint で画像生成・編集モデルを選択可能に
events.titleEn: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice
events.summary: You can now choose your preferred image model including OpenAI’s GPT Image, Flux, or Auto for smart, dynamic selection when creating or editing images with Copilot in PowerPoint, or when generating a new presentation or page.
events.summaryJa: PowerPoint で画像生成・編集モデルを選択可能に に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: You can now choose your preferred image model including OpenAI’s GPT Image, Flux, or Auto for smart, dynamic selection when creating or editing images with Copilot in PowerPoint, or when generating a new presentation or page.
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: PowerPoint: Create and Edit images with the model of your choice

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Find meetings based on topics and keywords
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Find meetings based on topics and keywords
events.summary: Copilot will be able to find meetings based on topics or keywords from relevant data like meeting body, chat and transcription.
events.summaryJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: Copilot will be able to find meetings based on topics or keywords from relevant data like meeting body, chat and transcription.
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to prevent Microsoft 365 Copilot processing content with sensitivity labels supports all storage locations
events.titleJa: Purview DLP で Copilot の機密データ保護を強化
events.titleEn: Microsoft Purview: Data Loss Prevention to prevent Microsoft 365 Copilot processing content with sensitivity labels supports all storage locations
events.summary: The Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing sensitive files in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint will now apply regardless of file storage location.
events.summaryJa: Purview DLP で Copilot の機密データ保護を強化 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: The Microsoft Purview Data Loss Prevention policy to restrict Microsoft 365 Copilot processing sensitive files in Word, Excel, and PowerPoint will now apply regardless of file storage location.
events.importanceReason: 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため / 文書や資料作成の体験変化が大きいため

events.title: OneDrive: Discover Copilot actions in File Preview
events.titleJa: ファイル プレビューで Copilot アクション提案を表示
events.titleEn: OneDrive: Discover Copilot actions in File Preview
events.summary: See what Copilot can do the moment you preview a file in OneDrive or SharePoint. Ready-to-use prompts appear alongside the Copilot button, helping you summarize documents, generate FAQs, and more — all without writing a single prompt.
events.summaryJa: ファイル プレビューで Copilot アクション提案を表示 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: See what Copilot can do the moment you preview a file in OneDrive or SharePoint. Ready-to-use prompts appear alongside the Copilot button, helping you summarize documents, generate FAQs, and more — all without writing a single prompt.
events.importanceReason: 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため / 文書や資料作成の体験変化が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Real-time voice interactions in a podcast in Word
events.titleJa: Word の Copilot 機能強化
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Real-time voice interactions in a podcast in Word
events.summary: Interact in real time with podcasts created by Copilot in Word. Today, audio summaries help you absorb content on the go, but they’re one-way—listeners can’t clarify or explore without stopping. With this feature, you can ask questions with your voice while listening and get answers instantly, staying in the audio exp...
events.summaryJa: Word の Copilot 機能強化 に関する更新。
events.summaryEn: Interact in real time with podcasts created by Copilot in Word. Today, audio summaries help you absorb content on the go, but they’re one-way—listeners can’t clarify or explore without stopping. With this feature, you can ask questions with your voice while listening and get answers instantly, staying in the audio exp...

events.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot app learning series: Real‑world scenarios for your workday
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot アプリ学習シリーズ: 勤務日の現実世界のシナリオ
events.titleEn: Microsoft 365 Copilot app learning series: Real‑world scenarios for your workday
events.summary:
If you’ve heard more about Microsoft 365 Copilot and wondering where to begin, you’re not alone. With AI becoming part of everyday work, many people are looking for guidance that’s practical, approachable, and grounded in real workflows—not just feature lists.
That’s why we’re e...
events.summaryJa:
Microsoft 365 Copilot について詳しく聞いて、何から始めればよいか疑問に思っているのは、あなただけではありません。 AI が日常業務の一部となりつつある今、多くの人が単なる機能リストではなく、実践的で親しみやすく、実際のワークフローに基づいたガイダンスを求めています。
だからこそ私たちは...
